search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20064` | head 1 | addinfo | eval selection_duration=strftime(info_min_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") . " - " . strftime(info_max_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | table selection_duration

`netflow_search_rule_20064` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes)` | eventstats latest(dest_host) as dest_host latest(src_host) as src_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip, src_ip, src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip, dest_ip, dest_host)` | strcat src_ip " - " dest_ip host_pair | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes) by host_pair,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20064` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | `sampling(bytes)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(packets_out)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eventstats latest(dest_host) as dest_host latest(src_host) as src_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip, src_ip, src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip, dest_ip, dest_host)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sumbytes_out sum(bytes) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(packets_out) as sumpacketsout sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip src_ip dest_ip _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | eval avgbits_in= sumbytes_in*8/($span_int$) | eval avgbits_out= sumbytes_out*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumbytes_in) as TrafficAmountIn sum(sumbytes_out) as TrafficAmountOut sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmountIn sum(sumpacketsout) as PacketsAmountOut sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic max(avgbits_in) as MaxTrafficIn max(avgbits_out) as MaxTrafficOut by exp_ip src_ip dest_ip nfo_hostname | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 20 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedIn=(TrafficAmountIn)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedOut=(TrafficAmountOut)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeedIn=(PacketsAmountIn)/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeedOut=(PacketsAmountOut)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeedIn=AverageSpeedIn/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountIn=TrafficAmountIn/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficIn=MaxTrafficIn/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedOut=AverageSpeedOut/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountOut=TrafficAmountOut/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficOut=MaxTrafficOut/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps received, TrafficSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps received, MaxTrafficIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB received, TrafficAmountIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps sent, TrafficSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps sent, MaxTrafficOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB sent, TrafficAmountOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s received, PacketsSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets received, PacketsAmountIn)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s sent, PacketsSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets sent, PacketsAmountOut)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table exp_ip_name src_ip dest_ip "Max Mbps received" "Average Mbps received" "Total Traffic MB received" "Max Mbps sent" "Average Mbps sent" "Total Traffic MB sent" "Average Packets/s received" "Total Packets received" "Average Packets/s sent" "Total Packets sent" "Total Connections" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip as "Server" | rename dest_ip as "Client"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10064: Top Pairs Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20064). This Module reports top Host Pairs network conversations. In contract to Module 10067 which reports consolidated unidirectional flows, this Module stitches client-server request-response flows, reporting bytes and packets server-to-client and client-to-server in separate fields. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
